The **7th National People's Congress** (**NPC**) was in session from 1988 to 1993. It held five sessions in this period.

## The first session

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=7th_National_People%27s_Congress&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: The first session")]

### Elected state leaders

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=7th_National_People%27s_Congress&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Elected state leaders")]

In the 1st Session in 1988, the Congress elected the state leaders:

* President of the People's Republic of China: [Yang Shangkun](/wiki/Yang_Shangkun "Yang Shangkun")
* Chairman of the Standing Committee of the National People's Congress: [Wan Li](/wiki/Wan_Li "Wan Li")
* Premier of the State Council: [Li Peng](/wiki/Li_Peng "Li Peng")
* Chairman of the Central Military Commission: [Deng Xiaoping](/wiki/Deng_Xiaoping "Deng Xiaoping")
* President of the Supreme People's Court: [Ren Jianxin](/wiki/Ren_Jianxin "Ren Jianxin")
* Procurator-General of the Supreme People's Procuratorate: [Liu Fuzhi](/wiki/Liu_Fuzhi "Liu Fuzhi")

## Third session

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=7th_National_People%27s_Congress&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Third session")]

At the 3rd session on April 4, 1990, the Hong Kong Basic Law was passed, which came into force 7 years later on July 1, 1997.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
